signals.headline: Trump Issues Ultimatum to Iran Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Issues Ultimatum to Iran Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade | NO | HIGH confidence**  
On April 16, 2026, Trump warned Iran to "make a deal" or face intensified U.S. naval blockade enforcement, including potential interceptions, but no blockade lift, ceasefire, or resolution was announced.[3]  
The Strait remains disrupted since Iran's March 2026 closure response to US-Israeli strikes.[3][4][6]

signals.raw:
